title: Silly Divinity
description: A mod about some silly and divine items (Ye i could not write this cuz of the mod's name)
body:
A silly mod about not at all overpowered items:

**All the content:**

**Weapons:**
- _Divine Sillysword_ (yes it is its real name) - Hold use       to charge the attack , release to create a shockwave knocking back and damage everyone in a radius determined by the charge time

- _Hammer Of Divinity_ - Basically a mace backport, does more damage based on vertical velocity, charge use to launch yourself upwards

- _Poleaxe_ - Resets enemy velocity on hit, heals the user when lands a hit

- _Stabby Stab_ - **WIP**, currently launches the user forward giving them strength effect

**Artifacts:**
- _Combustion Charm_ - You explode on death
- _Dash Rune_ - On use launches the user in their look direction for 1.5s
- _Hoverstone_ - Cancels all fall damage entirely
- _Florist Core_ - Heals the holder when standing on "grassy" blocks like: _Moss, Foliage, All types of grass_
- _Nullcore_ - Cancels one of negative effects, cancelled effect can be changed by using the item
- _Tank Restorator_ - Gives the holder _Regeneration and Resistance_ when below 5 hearts

Materials:
- _Tungsten_ - Obtained by crafting netherite scrap and iron ingots, used in most recipes in this mod
